name: retrieval-dataset-ncbi-datasets
description: Runs NCBI Datasets genome search/query/fetch through Omiga local subprocess routing.

sources.label: NCBI Datasets
sources.description: Genome assembly reports and download summaries via NCBI Datasets v2.
riskNotes: Read-only NCBI Datasets API; optional My NCBI API key is projected as an API header only when configured.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Lookup mode: accession, taxon, bioproject, biosample, wgs, or assembly_name.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Maximum genome assembly reports to request.

interface.shortDescription: NCBI Datasets genome metadata as a local retrieval plugin
interface.longDescription: Runs NCBI Datasets genome search/query/fetch through Omiga local subprocess routing.
defaultPrompt: Search NCBI Datasets for RefSeq assemblies.
Preview an NCBI Datasets genome package.
